mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_device_health ( device_id, record_date, health_score, risk_level, runtime_score, fault_score, workorder_score, replacement_score, predicted_failure_days, confidence_level, algorithm_version, created_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{recordDate}, #{healthScore}, #{riskLevel}, #{runtimeScore}, #{faultScore}, #{workorderScore}, #{replacementScore}, #{predictedFailureDays}, #{confidenceLevel}, #{algorithmVersion}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ai_device_health ( device_id, record_date, health_score, risk_level, runtime_score, fault_score, workorder_score, replacement_score, predicted_failure_days, confidence_level, algorithm_version, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.deviceId}, #{item.recordDate}, #{item.healthScore}, #{item.riskLevel}, #{item.runtimeScore}, #{item.faultScore}, #{item.workorderScore}, #{item.replacementScore}, #{item.predictedFailureDays}, #{item.confidenceLevel}, #{item.algorithmVersion}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.device_id, h.record_date, h.health_score, h.risk_level, h.runtime_score, h.fault_score, h.workorder_score, h.replacement_score, h.predicted_failure_days, h.confidence_level, h.algorithm_version, h.created_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name, e.importance_level AS device_importance FROM ai_device_health h LEFT JOIN equipment e ON h.device_id = e.id WHERE h.device_id = #{deviceId} AND h.record_date = #{recordDate}

SELECT h.id, h.device_id, h.record_date, h.health_score, h.risk_level, h.runtime_score, h.fault_score, h.workorder_score, h.replacement_score, h.predicted_failure_days, h.confidence_level, h.algorithm_version, h.created_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name, e.importance_level AS device_importance FROM ai_device_health h LEFT JOIN equipment e ON h.device_id = e.id WHERE h.device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY h.record_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT h.id, h.device_id, h.record_date, h.health_score, h.risk_level, h.runtime_score, h.fault_score, h.workorder_score, h.replacement_score, h.predicted_failure_days, h.confidence_level, h.algorithm_version, h.created_at FROM ai_device_health h WHERE h.device_id = #{deviceId} AND h.record_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY h.record_date ASC

SELECT h.id, h.device_id, h.record_date, h.health_score, h.risk_level, h.runtime_score, h.fault_score, h.workorder_score, h.replacement_score, h.predicted_failure_days, h.confidence_level, h.algorithm_version, h.created_at FROM ai_device_health h WHERE h.device_id = #{deviceId} AND h.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY h.record_date ASC

SELECT h.id, h.device_id, h.record_date, h.health_score, h.risk_level, h.runtime_score, h.fault_score, h.workorder_score, h.replacement_score, h.predicted_failure_days, h.confidence_level, h.algorithm_version, h.created_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name, e.importance_level AS device_importance FROM ai_device_health h LEFT JOIN equipment e ON h.device_id = e.id WHERE h.risk_level = #{riskLevel} AND h.record_date = ( SELECT MAX(record_date) FROM ai_device_health WHERE device_id = h.device_id ) ORDER BY h.health_score ASC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT h.risk_level AS riskLevel, COUNT(DISTINCT h.device_id) AS cnt FROM ai_device_health h WHERE h.record_date = ( SELECT MAX(record_date) FROM ai_device_health WHERE device_id = h.device_id ) GROUP BY h.risk_level
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT device_id) FROM ai_device_health WHERE record_date = (SELECT MAX(record_date) FROM ai_device_health)
SELECT AVG(health_score) FROM ai_device_health WHERE record_date = (SELECT MAX(record_date) FROM ai_device_health)

SELECT h.id, h.device_id, h.record_date, h.health_score, h.risk_level, h.runtime_score, h.fault_score, h.workorder_score, h.replacement_score, h.predicted_failure_days, h.confidence_level, h.algorithm_version, h.created_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name, e.importance_level AS device_importance FROM ai_device_health h LEFT JOIN equipment e ON h.device_id = e.id WHERE h.record_date = ( SELECT MAX(record_date) FROM ai_device_health WHERE device_id = h.device_id ) ORDER BY h.health_score ASC LIMIT #{limit}
